rationale: verification_command: bash .ddx/executions/20260514T163049-8389e54b/verify_ac.sh

Summary
=======

All four acceptance criteria for helix-ada6e67e are already satisfied at
base-rev b561d59. The bead description's preface ("Today the metadata is
incomplete and inconsistent: five dirs have no meta.yml, fourteen
dependencies.yaml files, dependencies: blocks in meta.yml") describes a
prior state that has since been resolved by upstream commits. The bead's
three scope actions (create missing meta.yml, delete dependencies.yaml,
strip dependencies: blocks) are therefore no-ops at HEAD.

Evidence per acceptance criterion
=================================

AC1 — Every workflows/phases/*/artifacts/*/ directory contains meta.yml,
template.md, and prompt.md.
    Verified: 0 missing files across all 44 artifact directories.
    Cited dirs (product-vision, business-case, competitive-analysis,
    opportunity-canvas, implementation-plan) each carry meta.yml,
    template.md, prompt.md, and example.md as of b561d59.

AC2 — `rg dependencies.yaml workflows/` returns no matches.
    Verified: find workflows -name dependencies.yaml ⇒ 0 files.

AC3 — No existing meta.yml carries a top-level `dependencies:` block.
    Verified: parsed all 44 meta.yml with PyYAML; no top-level
    `dependencies` key in any.

AC4 — The DDx artifact-types loader (one consumer) sees every HELIX
artifact type; a substrate-neutral walk of the meta.yml inventory
enumerates the same set.
    Verified: substrate-neutral walk of workflows/phases/*/artifacts/*/meta.yml
    yields 44 unique artifact.id values, one per artifact directory. No
    duplicate or missing artifact.id. The set is therefore equivalent
    regardless of consumer.

Notes
=====

The bead description text references a richer field superset
(artifact.{id, prefix, phase}, output.{location, naming},
id_format.{prefix, pattern, example}, prompts.{generation, review},
template.file, examples[]). This superset is not exercised by the AC.
Per-file coverage of those fields varies; if completing that schema
across all 44 artifacts is the intent, that should be tracked as a
follow-up bead since it requires per-artifact prefix and id_format
decisions (judgment calls) for ~40 files, and the formal AC for this
bead can already be closed by automated verification.

Consumer audit: scripts/generate-reference.py is the in-repo consumer
of meta.yml. It reads artifact.name, description, output.location, and
relationships. It does not require the richer superset fields. The
external DDx artifact-types loader lives outside this repo.
